must_detect.matched_text: Containment: vendor key revoked, TukoGuard rules tightened, CoconutDB audit flag enabled; we did not deploy any keylogger, and the breach window was a thin sliver of night.

Contacts and notifications: DPO — Atty. Mica L. Vergara (dpo@palengkeholdings.ph); investor queries to compliance@palengkeholdings.ph; data subjects to receive notices within 72 hours per DPA guidance.

Identified person: Mr. Roberto A. Ilagan (Employee No. HRS-093-Δ1; Finance Analyst; r.ilagan@palengkeholdings.ph) whose record included: health data (insulin therapy schedules and HMO claim codes), biometric data (fingerprint template file fp_tpl-E-09•7•5 .bin), religious affiliation declared as “Iglesia ng Liwanag” on optional HR form, union dues to “Palengke Workers Guild,” and dependent details for J.M. Ilagan (minor; SLH-15-Δ9 school ref).
Potential MNPI observed: “Project Daluyong” draft deck on a proposed PHP-denominated bond issuance, unaudited Q2 run rates, and a term sheet with placeholder covenants; these were not publicly disclosed at the time of access.
Assessment: a reasonable investor may find the draft terms and run-rate trends material; trading blackout was imposed for covered persons pending verification and any necessary current report.
Non-impact notes: no tax returns or BIR e-submissions were present; system health checks passed; references to public Treasury bill calendars were in a training PDF only.
Ancillary items: a purchase request for sports jerseys (Santa Isabela Komets) and a vendor brochure for Alabat CRM Sync were co-located; these are non-sensitive.
Root cause: third-party token for “Alabat CRM Sync” had excessive scope; event path shows vpn.palengkeholdings.ph/login?sid=gr4y-7t&redir=h%74%74ps://intra/hr/pay/exp%2FMay; logs show acc ****-44 88 sch ed ule mismatches consistent with replay.
Containment: vendor key revoked, TukoGuard rules tightened, CoconutDB audit flag enabled; we did not deploy any keylogger, and the breach window was a thin sliver of night.
Contacts and notifications: DPO — Atty. Mica L. Vergara (dpo@palengkeholdings.ph); investor queries to compliance@palengkeholdings.ph; data subjects to receive notices within 72 hours per DPA guidance.
